text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 81 

DAYS_SUPPLY 

LABEL: Days’ Supply 

DESCRIPTION: Number of days’ supply dispensed. 

SHORT NAME: DAYS_SUPPLY 

LONG NAME: DAYS_SUPPLY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: Values should be between 365 and 365 

COMMENT: A negative value may be present if a negative adjustment is made (e.g., incorrect prescription was 
issued,
